summary: TG Exchange full flow testing completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical pages tested and working correctly. App restored successfully after corruption.

minor.issue: CoinGecko API rate limited (429) - fallback prices used correctly

issues: Console warnings about animation style properties - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Market prices endpoint returns 50 coins with correct data
User registration requires referral code
User registration with invalid referral code rejected
User registration with admin referral code (TGADMIN2024) works
User login with invalid credentials rejected
User login with demo credentials works
Login response time < 3s
Wallet balance display shows Spot and Futures balances
Deposit limits endpoint returns min/max/allowed amounts
All deposit addresses generated (BSC, ETH, Polygon, TRON, Solana)
BSC deposit address format valid (0x, 42 chars)
ETH deposit address format valid
Polygon deposit address format valid
TRON deposit address format valid (starts with T)
Solana deposit address format valid
Chart data endpoint works (with fallback on rate limit)
Referral stats endpoint returns total_referrals and total_earnings
Referral code generation works
Team rank info endpoint returns direct_referrals and total_team
Profile data endpoint returns user info
Admin login works with correct credentials
Admin dashboard stats endpoint returns total_users
Wallet API response time < 2s
Market prices API response time < 3s
frontend_tests_passed: Login form accepts credentials and submits
Dashboard loads with balance ($10,930.23), quick actions, coin list
Wallet page shows Spot and Futures balances
Deposit page shows network selector (BSC), amount buttons ($50-$500)
Trade page shows candlestick chart, order book, buy/sell buttons
Referral page shows referral code (CVB57E6DAA), 10-level structure
Team Rank page shows rank progress, all ranks list
Profile page shows user info (Demo User, Gold, Verified)
Admin dashboard shows stats (24 users, $1,100 deposits)
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection shows intermittent disconnection warnings - not critical
Console warnings about animation style properties during loading - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests (auto-cleanup not needed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features tested and working. Deposit address endpoint is /api/user/deposit-address?network=bsc (not /api/deposit/address/bsc). Admin referral codes: TGADMIN2024, ADMIN2024, TGADMIN, ADMINCODE. CoinGecko API may rate limit - fallback prices are used correctly.
